structure.app_shell: h-screen w-full flex overflow-hidden bg-slate-950 text-slate-50
structure.sidebar_left: w-80 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-slate-800 bg-slate-900/50 flex flex-col overflow-hidden
structure.sidebar_right: w-80 lg:w-96 flex-shrink-0 border-l border-slate-800 bg-slate-900/50 flex flex-col overflow-hidden
structure.panel_header: h-14 border-b border-slate-800 flex items-center justify-between px-4 shrink-0 bg-slate-900

surfaces.inputs: bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 focus:border-amber-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-500/50 rounded-none transition-colors text-sm
surfaces.buttons_primary: bg-amber-500 text-slate-950 font-semibold hover:bg-amber-400 rounded-none transition-colors px-4 py-2 text-sm
surfaces.buttons_secondary: bg-slate-800 text-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-700 border border-slate-700 rounded-none transition-colors px-4 py-2 text-sm
surfaces.buttons_ghost: hover:bg-slate-800 text-slate-300 hover:text-slate-50 rounded-none transition-colors px-4 py-2 text-sm

data_table.wrapper: border border-slate-800 rounded-none flex flex-col h-full bg-slate-900/50
data_table.header: bg-slate-900 sticky top-0 z-10 border-b border-slate-800
data_table.header_cell: px-4 py-2 text-left text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-400 font-semibold
data_table.row: border-b border-slate-800/50 hover:bg-slate-800/80 transition-colors group cursor-pointer

metric_card.container: p-4 border-r border-b border-slate-800 flex flex-col gap-1 bg-slate-900/30
metric_card.label: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-400

filter_chip.base: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 text-xs font-mono rounded-none border transition-colors

suspicious_flag.container: p-3 border-l-2 bg-slate-900 border-b border-r border-slate-800 flex flex-col gap-1

entity_list_item.container: p-3 border-b border-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-800/50 cursor-pointer flex flex-col gap-1 transition-colors

data_testid_rules: All interactive elements, rows, and key metrics MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, specifying their role (e.g., 'entity-list-item', 'transaction-row', 'filter-chip-date').
instructions_to_main_agent: Do not implement complex routing if not needed; state-based view switching is acceptable for a single-page app.
Build a 3-pane layout: Left Sidebar (Entities), Main Canvas (Investigation), Right Sidebar (Findings).
Use pure HTML/Tailwind (divs, sections) for the complex layout grid to ensure maximum screen real estate and exact control. Avoid restricting container components from Shadcn for layout.
Data tables must use JetBrains Mono for all amounts, IDs, and dates, with tabular-nums.
Implement 'Grid Borders (The Technical Look)' for the summary bento/cards: border-collapse style layout, subtle borders on right and bottom, flat backgrounds.
Do NOT use soft shadows or rounded corners (radius). Keep UI sharp and rectangular (rounded-none) for the forensic/terminal feel.
Ensure the app functions perfectly client-side (parsing CSV, generating metrics in-memory, filtering).
Implement virtualization (e.g., @tanstack/react-virtual) for the transaction table to handle 100,000+ rows smoothly. This is critical.
Apply custom CSS to hide scrollbars or use thin, styled scrollbars to maximize data density.
Color logic: Credits should use emerald-400, Debits should use red-400 or amber-400 depending on anomaly severity. Masked accounts use monospace asterisks.
